items.title: If you happened to have used your previous reset in the few hours before and didn't go th…
items.title_zh: 如果您碰巧在前几个小时内使用了之前的重置，但没有进行……
items.description: If you happened to have used your previous reset in the few hours before and didn't go through your usage, do not worry, you will get more manual resets after we conclude the investigation.
items.description_zh: 如果您碰巧在前几个小时内使用过之前的重置，但没有完成您的使用情况，请不要担心，在我们结束调查后，您将获得更多手动重置。

items.title: As we are still investigating, I have reset everyone's Codex usage limits.
items.title_zh: 由于我们仍在调查，我已经重置了每个人的 Codex 使用限制。
items.description: As we are still investigating, I have reset everyone's Codex usage limits. This is a hard reset given some users had stacked up to three banked resets already that they can apply on their own schedule. Funnily enough, this week at OpenAI i…
items.description_zh: 由于我们仍在调查，我已经重置了每个人的 Codex 使用限制。这是一次硬重置，因为一些用户已经累积了多达三个银行重置，他们可以按照自己的时间表应用。有趣的是，本周在 OpenAI i...

items.title: Codex team is in a warroom on a Sunday combing through logs and checking whether there is…
items.title_zh: 周日，Codex 团队正在一间作战室中梳理日志并检查是否有……
items.description: Codex team is in a warroom on a Sunday combing through logs and checking whether there is anything that could lead to increased usage drains for some users. Taking it very seriously and won't rest until we get to the bottom of it. https://…
items.description_zh: 周日，Codex 团队在一间作战室中梳理日志，检查是否有任何内容可能导致某些用户的使用量增加。我们非常认真地对待这件事，不追查到底就不会罢休。 https://…

items.title: It should be 100% obvious that there will soon be mythos level models on cyber security t…
items.title_zh: 应该 100% 显而易见的是，很快就会出现关于网络安全的神话级模型……
items.description: It should be 100% obvious that there will soon be mythos level models on cyber security that are open and available to anyone. As a byproduct of this, alternative tech stacks will emerge that also drive more economic value and control away…
